channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: These American Service Members Died in the Iran Conflict - The New York Times
item.description:
1. These American Service Members Died in the Iran Conflict  The New York Times
  2. Live updates: Pentagon releases the names of 4 killed troops and says they died in a drone strike in Kuwait  AP News
  3. Pentagon identifies four soldiers killed in March 1 drone strike during Kuwait military operation  Fox News
  4. Iran updates: Americans killed by retaliatory strike identified, Trump administration pledges to 'unleash' more attacks  Yahoo
  5. No warning, no siren: Six US service members killed in Iranian strike that hit makeshift operations center in Kuwait  CNN

item.title: Israel Is Blowing Up Iran’s Police State to Clear the Way for a Revolt - WSJ
item.description:
1. Israel Is Blowing Up Iran’s Police State to Clear the Way for a Revolt  WSJ

  5. Iran updates: US bases, embassies attacked as Tehran steps up Gulf strikes  Al Jazeera

item.title: CIA station in Saudi capital hit in drone attack - The Washington Post
item.description:
1. CIA station in Saudi capital hit in drone attack  The Washington Post

  4. All personnel accounted for after drone attack on US consulate grounds, Rubio says  CNN

item.title: US closes several Middle East embassies as it urges Americans to flee region - Politico
item.description:
1. US closes several Middle East embassies as it urges Americans to flee region  Politico

item.title: Live Updates: Trump defends war with Iran as conflict widens, military names first service members who were killed - CBS News
item.description:
1. Live Updates: Trump defends war with Iran as conflict widens, military names first service members who were killed  CBS News
  2. Live updates: Israel hits Beirut and Tehran as Trump warns Iran of escalated strikes  CNN

  4. Trump, Rubio offer conflicting reasons for US entry into Iran war  Reuters
  5. Iran war: The US is burning through ammo. Its enemies will be taking notice  Sky News

item.title: UAE considers striking Iranian missile sites as regional war spreads - Axios
item.description:
1. UAE considers striking Iranian missile sites as regional war spreads  Axios

item.title: War with Iran strains the US-UK relationship as Starmer and Trump disagree - AP News
item.description:

  4. Trump rebukes Starmer over UK refusal to back strikes on Iran  The Guardian
  5. Starmer at odds with Trump in biggest disagreement yet  BBC

item.title: Greece deploys warships, jets to Cyprus after drone strikes on UK air base Akrotiri - Defense News
item.description:
1. Greece deploys warships, jets to Cyprus after drone strikes on UK air base Akrotiri  Defense News

item.title: Israel sends troops into southern Lebanon as Hezbollah says it is ready for ‘open war’ - AP News
item.description:
1. Israel sends troops into southern Lebanon as Hezbollah says it is ready for ‘open war’  AP News

item.title: As Trump Bashes Spain on Military Spending, German Chancellor Merz Looks On - The New York Times

item.title: Hacked traffic cameras and US intelligence: How a plot to kill Iran’s supreme leader came together - CNN
item.description:

  4. Trump Opens the Pandora’s Box of Assassination  The Atlantic

item.title: Poland Will Eventually Seek Its Own Nuclear Weapons, Tusk Says - Bloomberg

item.title: How the Iran war is affecting global travel - BBC
item.description:

item.title: How Iran Is Using Drones to Retaliate Against the U.S. and Allies - The New York Times
item.description:
1. How Iran Is Using Drones to Retaliate Against the U.S. and Allies  The New York Times

  4. Cheap, effective and battle-tested by Russia: Iran leans on Shahed drones to penetrate U.S. defenses  NBC News
  5. Iran’s Shahed drones have brought terror to Ukrainian skies – now they are being deployed in the Middle East  The Guardian

item.title: US strikes on Iran ‘outside international law,’ says Macron - politico.eu

item.title: Tensions flare as lawmakers question Iran war’s costs, risks and strategy - AP News
item.description:
1. Tensions flare as lawmakers question Iran war’s costs, risks and strategy  AP News

item.title: What China’s response to the US attack on Iran says about its foreign policy - AP News
item.description:
1. What China’s response to the US attack on Iran says about its foreign policy  AP News

  3. 5 charts show China’s oil dilemma after US strikes on Iran  Politico
  4. China’s ice-cold calculus over Iran  The Economist
  5. Trump’s show of force in the Middle East creates a weakness China can exploit  The Guardian
